The question is asking to identify which season had its premiere in September. Since each row represents a season with its premiere date, and the "season premiere" column indicates when each season started, we need to group by the "season premiere" column to analyze the months when seasons premiered. We can use the f_group_column(season premiere) operation to group the seasons by their premiere date to find out which one occurred in September.
The only season that premiered in September was season 6, which had its premiere on September 6, 2010. Therefore, the answer is season 6.
